notes: Average reading achievement of grade-3 students, expressed as grade-level units (3.0 = exactly at 3rd-grade level).
Source: Stanford Education Data Archive (via CHR&R 2025).
Coverage is partial — many counties (especially small/rural) are not represented in the SEDA sample.
Pulled from CHR&R 2025 analytic file column "Reading Scores raw value" at col index 572.
Published calibration value: 3.05 grade-level (CHR&R US national row).
